title: TEST: Oggetti e armi
description: Scena con 3 armi in bella vista (solo 2 slot esistono) e altri oggetti offerti con offerItem: il giocatore sceglie cosa prendere, un oggetto alla volta, col pulsante 'Prendi' — niente più addItem automatici che scartano in silenzio quello che eccede lo spazio (21/07/2026, richiesta di Michele).

scenes.narrativeText: The old storeroom is thick with dust, but its shelves are far from empty. A broadsword leans against the wall beside a well-kept mace, and further along a simple dagger rests atop a folded cloak. Two sacks nearby hold provisions and a small clay flask, and a tarnished ring catches the last of the light.

choices.choiceText: Take what you can carry and move on

params.itemName: Tarnished Ring of the Old Kingdom

scenes.narrativeText: You leave the storeroom behind, your pack heavier and your choices made. Whatever comes next, you are better equipped to face it.
